messages.author: Macsporran68
messages.text: Help! Tonight I erased and flashed my new Lilygo T5 S3 Pro without GPS and all I have is a frozen screen, flashing screen. I have tried to re- flash but it's still the same. My previous T5 S3 Pro had GPS and it done this so I'm not sure what's gone wrong. Sandisk 32gb sd card has been formatted Fat 32 twice then inserted before doing the flash. I am confused as the firmware clearly states non gps and that's what I've used, non GPS. Can someone point me in the right direction please?
messages.content_html: Help! Tonight I erased and flashed my new Lilygo T5 S3 Pro without GPS and all I have is a frozen screen, flashing screen. I have tried to re- flash but it's still the same. My previous T5 S3 Pro had GPS and it done this so I'm not sure what's gone wrong. Sandisk 32gb sd card has been formatted Fat 32 twice then inserted before doing the flash. I am confused as the firmware clearly states non gps and that's what I've used, non GPS. Can someone point me in the right direction please?

messages.author: Scott
messages.text: The non GPS version is very different hardware, but looks the same.
messages.content_html: The non GPS version is very different hardware, but looks the same.
